changelog: Login reliability fix: (1) crypto.js — drop unused 3rd arg to deriveKey() that caused PBKDF2 crash → 503/1102 on /api/login. (2) login.js — try/catch around verifyPassword + idempotent seed of admin user if KV 'users:all' missing. (3) auth.js (frontend) — automatic fallback to legacy /api/auth/login when primary endpoint 5xx.
